tooltip.gatewayexpansion.stability_pearl: +15s gateway time, -10% max health for the rest of the gate

command.gatewayexpansion.coins.player_on: Only a player can use this command.
command.gatewayexpansion.coins.not_enoug: You do not have enough Mythic Coins.

jei.gatewayexpansion.info.crystals.0: Crystals are the base component for the Gateway Workbench.
jei.gatewayexpansion.info.crystals.1: Higher tier crystals support stronger generated gateways and rewards.
jei.gatewayexpansion.info.augments.0: Augments raise gateway difficulty and push rewards upward when inserted into the Gateway Workbench.
jei.gatewayexpansion.info.augments.1: Different rolls carry different effects and can significantly change the resulting gateway.
jei.gatewayexpansion.info.catalysts.0: Catalysts add tradeoffs in the Gateway Workbench, exchanging safety, pressure, and loot.
jei.gatewayexpansion.info.catalysts.1: Different catalyst rolls change the tradeoff between safety, pressure, and rewards.
